title: [FIRRTL] Support dynamic indexed vector element in Target

features.name: dynamic variable index into unpacked array of structs with field access
features.description: Code should include an unpacked array of structs where a struct field is accessed using a variable (non-literal) index expression, mirroring FIRRTL annotation targets of the form vec[idx].field

features.name: dynamic index on packed array with non-literal variable
features.description: Code should include a packed vector (or unpacked array) indexed by a non-constant variable signal, where the index width may not match the clog2 of the array size

features.name: keep attribute on dynamically indexed struct field
features.description: Code should include a (* keep *) or DontTouch-style preserve attribute applied to a signal that is accessed through a dynamically indexed aggregate (array of structs), testing annotation resolution on non-literal targets
